\tzpentry{ID3285}{Alfven Displacement Wave Wave Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3285 introduces Alfven Displacement Wave Wave Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{ \partial^2 \xi}{ \partial t^2} = v_A^2 \nabla^2 \xi + \frac{1}{ \mu_0 \rho} ( \nabla \times \mathbf{B}) \times ( \nabla \times \delta \mathbf{B}) \end{equation}
